versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish rnd4 runs/rnd4_s0.zip runs/rnd4_s1.zip runs/rnd4_s2.zip --kind model --note Draft-noise study arm C: B0 recipe + --draft-noise 4 (the ~free-deck-cost point), 800k zoo, PR #55. Paired ceiling-eval vs b0: 0.649 vs 0.657, delta -0.008 CI [-0.016, +0.001] -- VERDICT: null. Degrades ~half B0's slope under eval deck noise but from a lower clean baseline; B0 ties or beats at every noise level. --meta {"avg_hard3": 0.649, "verdict": "null", "obs_mode": "token", "steps": 800000, "draft_noise": 4}
versions.note: Draft-noise study arm C: B0 recipe + --draft-noise 4 (the ~free-deck-cost point), 800k zoo, PR #55. Paired ceiling-eval vs b0: 0.649 vs 0.657, delta -0.008 CI [-0.016, +0.001] -- VERDICT: null. Degrades ~half B0's slope under eval deck noise but from a lower clean baseline; B0 ties or beats at every noise level.
